text:
Mandam (マンダム, Mandamu) is the Captain and Coordinator for all of the Royal Bodyguards affiliated with Queen Duazul. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Mandam has a wrinkled face and white hair combed in a cowlick. He has a prominent dark rumple nose. Like the other bodyguards, he wears a black suit and a tie. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

According to Slakka, his superior Mandam acts as a coordinator to everyone affiliated with Queen Duazul.
